name: Pork Chop Casserole 1
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, Family size
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Brown pork chops seasoned with dill weed, salt and pepper in oil.
3. Place chops in a baking dish. Top with potatoes.
4. Combine other ingredients, except cheddar cheese, and pour over potatoes.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until pork chops are tender.
6. Sprinkle cheddar cheese over the top and return to oven to melt and brown cheese. About 5 minutes to melt and 5 minutes under broiler to brown cheese.
